scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix lambda && npm install --prefix infrastructure
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectDynamoStack ConnectBackendStack ConnectFrontendStack --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectStagingDynamoStack ConnectStagingBackendStack ConnectStagingFrontendStack --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:all: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy --all --require-approval never
scripts.sync:prod: aws s3 sync frontend/out/ s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ConnectFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`FrontendBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) --delete
scripts.sync:staging: aws s3 sync frontend/out/ s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ConnectStagingFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`FrontendBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) --delete
scripts.invalidate:prod: aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ConnectFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`CloudFrontDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*'
scripts.invalidate:staging: aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ConnectStagingFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`CloudFrontDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*'
